flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Central Missouri rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.8k → $6.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Central Missouri fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4k → 5.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Central Missouri rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.8k → $18.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Central Missouri fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
